/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/klaus_6502_functional_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_6502.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_klaus_6502  -ldl -lm
